name: HTTP Action Bot
description: Triggers safe REST API requests from WhatsApp commands and renders JSON responses back to chat.
author: Yudhi Armyndharis <yudhi@rmyndharis.com>

baseUrl.title: Base URL
baseUrl.description: HTTPS origin, e.g. https://erp.example.com. Its host is auto-added to the outbound allowlist (allowConfigHosts). Must be non-empty — without it every fetch is silently gated to a no-op.

authToken.title: Token / API key
authToken.description: Bearer token or API key (per authType). Masked ***.

apiKeyHeader.description: Header name to use when authType=apikey.

actions.title: Actions (JSON array)
actions.description: JSON array of actions. Example: [{"id":"check-order","match":{"type":"prefix","value":"cek-order "},"request":{"method":"GET","path":"/orders/{{args.0}}"},"replyTemplate":"Order {{response.orderId}}: {{response.status}}"}]. Parsed at config time.
